title: Northern Trust Releases 2022 Philanthropic Impact Report
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) donated more than $165 million over the past decade to non-profit organizations, including more than $19 million in 2022 to organizations working to provide food security, affordable housing, accessible healthcare and quality education. Additionally, Northern Trust employees have provided more than 1 million hours of volunteer service over the past decade.

title: Northern Trust to Offer Integration with SimCorp as Part of its Whole Office™ Strategy
text: LONDON & COPENHAGEN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As part of its continuing Whole Office™ strategy to serve client needs across the entire investment lifecycle, Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) has reached an agreement with SimCorp®, a leading provider of Software as a Service (SaaS) investment management solutions, to enable integration for efficient data exchange for clients using the SimCorp Dimension® platform.

title: Northern Trust Announces New President of Asset Management Business
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) announced today that Daniel Gamba will serve as Northern Trust's new President of Asset Management (NTAM), effective April 3. He will join Northern Trust's Management Group and report to Chief Executive Officer Michael O'Grady. Gamba joins Northern Trust from BlackRock, Inc.

title: Northern Trust Asset Management Launches Natural Capital Paris-Aligned Strategy
text: LONDON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Northern Trust Asset Management (NTAM), one of the world's leading investment managers, continues to expand its sustainable index investment solutions with the launch of the World Natural Capital Paris-Aligned Index strategy.
